subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! Upon thee rest My glory and My loving-kindness. The luminous Branch hath presented before the countenance of the Wronged One the missive that was sent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین علیک بهائی و عنایتی غصنی ضیا نامه مرسله را امام وجه مظلوم عرض نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
